batch_summary.note: Aug–Sep 2024: ROW-6819 coaching admission (Aug 21): 'I've told her to have conversations and I also give her things to tell you about.' — RF-08 Sev-3 arc activation, RF-09 ADD-002 forward anchor (undenied). No RF-09 primary signals this batch — ROW-6819 is a coaching admission, not a denial. Forward anchor registered: any post-ROW-6819 coaching denial = Level A RF-09 Sev-2.
